Uses of Interface
shot_boxes.ShotBoxes

Packages that use ShotBoxes
Package
Description
game
 
player
 
shot_boxes.informations
 
shot_boxes.questions
 

  • Uses of ShotBoxes in game

    Methods in game with parameters of type ShotBoxes
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    Game.checkInteraction(KnowledgeKeepers keeper, ShotBoxes shotBox)
    Checks for interaction between player and shot boxes, updates score and health, and handles level progression.

  • Uses of ShotBoxes in player

    Methods in player with parameters of type ShotBoxes
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    Player.interact(ShotBoxes shotBox)
    Increase score or decrease health according to actual type of shotBox, and the required line is written in the log file

  • Uses of ShotBoxes in shot_boxes.informations

    Classes in shot_boxes.informations that implement ShotBoxes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    EasyInformations
    Represents an easy-level information object in the game.
    class 
    HardInformations
    Represents a hard-level information box in the game.
    class 
    Informations
    The Informations abstract class represents info boxes.
    class 
    MidInformations
    Represents a medium-level information box in the game.

  • Uses of ShotBoxes in shot_boxes.questions

    Classes in shot_boxes.questions that implement ShotBoxes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    EasyQuestions
    Represents an easy-level question box that appears in the game.
    class 
    HardQuestions
    Represents a hard-level question box that appears in the game.
    class 
    MidQuestions
    Represents a medium-level question box in the game.
    class 
    Questions
    The Questions abstract class represents question objects that fall during gameplay, and can be interacted with by the player to loss health as penalty.
